rac-size-matters-v0.3.2.description:
## RaC Size Matters APWorld rac-size-matters-v0.3.2 **Branch:** main **Date:** 2026-06-27 10:30 UTC
Changes since initial commit - fix: update controller mapping to match RAC2 & RAC3 (eb7a7bd6) - fix: bug in planet select softlock prevention (d3051265) - fix: traps and offline filler items (a2b18692) - fix: broken vendor logic (4d451171) - fix: added poptracker and vendor logic (c67eefc3) - fix: build/release and planet select softlock prevention (fddb4028) - fix: fixed incorrect comments and vendor refresh (ad150161) - update to new constants and detect wrong game type (ff23f906) - Move rac size matters to ap fork (f678bd6e)
**Full changelog and compare**: https://github.com/Panguu/Archipelago-RaCSM/commits/main ### Notes This release was automatically generated from the **main** branch. Latest (main) releases are recommended, as pre-releases (staging) may contain experimental or in-progress changes.
rac-size-matters-v0.3.2.title: RaC Size Matters APWorld v0.3.2

rac-size-matters/v0.3.3.description:
## RaC Size Matters APWorld rac-size-matters/v0.3.3 **Branch:** main **Date:** 2026-07-01 00:20 UTC
Changes since initial commit - feat(sync): weapons and armour is now synced for reconnections (5a57f8cb) - fix: steal more of rac3 pine logic (0803aad1) - fix: update controller mapping to match RAC2 & RAC3 (eb7a7bd6) - fix: bug in planet select softlock prevention (d3051265) - fix: traps and offline filler items (a2b18692) - fix: broken vendor logic (4d451171) - fix: added poptracker and vendor logic (c67eefc3) - fix: build/release and planet select softlock prevention (fddb4028) - fix: fixed incorrect comments and vendor refresh (ad150161) - update to new constants and detect wrong game type (ff23f906) - Move rac size matters to ap fork (f678bd6e)
**Full changelog and compare**: https://github.com/Panguu/Archipelago-RaCSM/commits/main ### Notes This release was automatically generated from the **main** branch. Latest (main) releases are recommended, as pre-releases (staging) may contain experimental or in-progress changes.
